summary: Iteration 27 - Tested NEW AI Smart Notifications feature. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. Smart Insights section generates AI-powered insights from streaming trends, displays them with category badges, metric values, priorities, and action suggestions. Notifications panel shows AI insights with lightning bolt icon and 'AI Insight' label.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/ai/smart-insights requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: GET /api/ai/smart-insights requires authentication (returns 401/422 without token)
Backend: POST /api/ai/smart-insights generates 3-5 AI insights from streaming trend analysis
Backend: POST /api/ai/smart-insights returns insights array with fields: id, message, type (ai_insight), category, priority, metric_value, action_suggestion
Backend: POST /api/ai/smart-insights returns data_context with recent_streams, previous_streams, overall_growth
Backend: POST /api/ai/smart-insights stores insights as notifications in database
Backend: GET /api/ai/smart-insights returns saved AI insights from notifications collection
Backend: GET /api/ai/smart-insights only returns type=ai_insight notifications
Backend: GET /api/notifications includes AI insight notifications alongside regular ones
Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count counts AI insight notifications as unread
Backend: POST /api/ai/release-strategy still works (regression)
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/save still works (regression)
Backend: POST /api/ai/strategies/export-pdf still works (regression)
Frontend: Fan Analytics page shows Smart Insights section with data-testid='smart-insights-section'
Frontend: 'Analyze Trends' button triggers insight generation with loading state ('Analyzing...')
Frontend: Generated insights display with category badge (GEOGRAPHIC, PLATFORM, TIMING, CAMPAIGN)
Frontend: Generated insights display with metric value (+50%, -28.6%, +42.9%, etc.)
Frontend: Generated insights display with priority indicator (HIGH, MEDIUM)
Frontend: Generated insights display with message and action suggestion
Frontend: Notification bell shows AI insight notifications with lightning bolt icon
Frontend: AI insight notifications show 'AI Insight' label in purple
Frontend: AI insight notifications show metric_value badge
Frontend: AI insight notifications show action_suggestion in purple text
critical_code_review_comments: Smart Insights uses GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key to analyze 7-day streaming trends
Insights are stored as notifications with type='ai_insight' for unified notification system
Frontend SmartInsightCard component properly displays all insight fields
NotificationPanel enhanced to show lightning bolt icon and 'AI Insight' label for AI notifications
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 tested the NEW AI Smart Notifications feature. Backend endpoints: POST /api/ai/smart-insights (generates insights via GPT-4o, stores in notifications collection with type='ai_insight') and GET /api/ai/smart-insights (reads them back). Frontend: Smart Insights section on Fan Analytics page (data-testid='smart-insights-section') with 'Analyze Trends' button (data-testid='analyze-trends-btn'). SmartInsightCard component displays category, metric_value, priority, message, and action_suggestion. NotificationPanel shows AI insights with lightning bolt icon, 'AI Insight' label, metric_value badge, and action_suggestion. All previous endpoints still work (regression verified).

mocked_apis.AI Smart Insights: NOT MOCKED - uses real Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o)
mocked_apis.AI Release Strategy: NOT MOCKED - uses real Emergent LLM Key (GPT-4o)
mocked_apis.PDF Export: NOT MOCKED - uses real reportlab library

response.insights: Array of insight objects with id, message, type, category, priority, metric_value, action_suggestion
response.data_context: Object with recent_streams, previous_streams, overall_growth, top_country, top_platform

components: Lightning bolt icon with gradient background

ai_insight_styling: Lightning bolt icon with gradient background (from-[#7C4DFF] to-[#E040FB])
